user.title: Search Stop
user.description: Enter the Name of the Stop to find the Stop ID

direction_input.title: Direction Filter (Optional)
direction_input.description:
Do you want to filter departures by a specific direction?

Example: 'Zwickauer Damm' will only show trains that stop there.

Leave empty to skip this step.

direction_select.title: Select Direction Station
direction_select.description: Multiple stations found. Which one did you mean?

data.duration: Show departures for how many minutes?

error.api_rate_limited: Stop search failed: API rate limited (too many requests). Try again in a few minutes.
error.api_unreachable: Stop search failed: Cannot reach the API server. Try again in a few minutes.
error.api_timeout: Stop search failed: API is slow or not responding. Try again in a few minutes.
error.api_disconnected: Stop search failed: API server disconnected. Try again in a few minutes.
error.api_error: Stop search failed: Network or API error. Try again in a few minutes.
error.api_unexpected_error: Stop search failed: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found for '{search_query}'. Try a different or shorter name.
